title: DRW MD-DRW-534: GPS v2 Antenna Installation
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-534 Rev D — GPS v2 Antenna Installation

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1097, P-1098, P-1102, P-1117.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Sam Dreher, approved by Felix Herrera.
